yyork doctor found issues
Required failures: agent-cli

Runtime requirements
  OK       zellij  required  /opt/yyork/bin/zellij (source: bundled)
  OK       git     required  /usr/bin/git

Agent CLI availability
  MISSING  claude-code  optional  Claude Code is the default agent; install it or spawn with another available agent.
  MISSING  codex        optional  Codex sessions are unavailable until the codex CLI is on PATH.
  MISSING  agent-cli    required  Install at least one supported agent CLI, such as Claude Code or Codex, before spawning sessions.

Next steps
  - Install Claude Code or Codex, then rerun `yyork doctor`.
